name: Upsells: After Visit

title.fr: Message de vente additionnelle apres la visite
title.es: Mensaje de venta adicional despues de la visita

description.en: Send a personalized follow-up with product recommendations after a customer visit.
description.de: Eine personalisierte Nachricht mit Produktempfehlungen nach einem Kundenbesuch senden.
description.fr: Envoyer un suivi personnalise avec des recommandations de produits apres la visite d un client.
description.es: Enviar un seguimiento personalizado con recomendaciones de productos despues de la visita de un cliente.
description.ro: Trimite un follow-up personalizat cu recomandari de produse dupa vizita unui client.

bot: When this warp is triggered: fetches the contact, composes a thank-you message with upsell recommendations, and sends it via WhatsApp.

inputs.name: Contact

description.en: Which customer to follow up with?
description.ro: Cu care client sa faci follow-up?

inputs.bot: The contact ID of the customer who just visited.

inputs.name: Service Completed

description.en: What service did they just have?

inputs.bot: The service or treatment the customer just completed. Used to recommend complementary products.

actions.prompt: Compose a thank-you message in German (du-form) for {{CONTACT_NAME}} who just had: {{serviceCompleted}}. Recommend a related product or complementary service naturally.

success.de: Empfehlungen nach dem Besuch werden gesendet...
success.fr: Envoi des recommandations apres la visite...
